location: Hotel de la Victoire, Paris, France
text: Epstein shipped packages to Alberto Pinto (designer) at Paris hotel and to Maxwell in London, May-June 2001.

location: Zorro Ranch, Stanley, New Mexico, United States
text: FedEx envelope addressed to Jeffrey Epstein at Zorro Ranch, May 2001 — confirming his presence at the NM property.
Epstein personally shipped a package to Ghislaine Maxwell at her London residence, July 2006.

location: Woods Hole Oceanographic Institution, Woods Hole MA
text: Epstein met oceanographer David Gallo at WHOI on May 13, 2012 -- email confirms the meeting.
Epstein and Maxwell fossil hunting with paleontologist Jack Horner and Bobby Kennedy, Aug 2012.
